title: Mike Tyson's Punch-Out!!
platform_style_description: NES aesthetic, limited palette, simple iconic forms, crisp outlines, and strong silhouette readability
main_subject: a short determined boxer in gloves seen from the ring corner
environment: a bright boxing ring with one huge opponent silhouette looming across the ropes
action_mood_cue: bouncing lightly just before the opening bell
composition: one small boxer foreground, one large opponent silhouette background, ring ropes framing the space, and no crowd detail
memory_hook: size contrast, ring pressure, and the feeling of an impossible title fight
legal_notes: Risk level: low. Use generic archetypes, avoid franchise-identifiable costume or symbol language, and preserve recognizability through atmosphere, scene memory, and gameplay cues only.
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Sport game.

A short determined boxer in gloves seen from the ring corner in a bright boxing ring with one huge opponent silhouette looming across the ropes, bouncing lightly just before the opening bell.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- NES aesthetic, limited palette, simple iconic forms, crisp outlines, and strong silhouette readability
- always rendered as pixel art
- crisp pixel edges, readable sprite-like shading, and controlled dithering when useful
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- tense, arcade, underdog

Composition:
- one small boxer foreground, one large opponent silhouette background, ring ropes framing the space, and no crowd detail
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- pixel art only
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid official boxer likeness, avoid exact roster proportions, avoid franchise UI, avoid branded trunks or gloves

generation_notes.detail_policy: rich enough to feel desirable, simple enough to read fast
